seoTitle: Gordon Park vs Gordonstone — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gordon Park and Gordonstone. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Gordon Park vs Gordonstone: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gordon Park and Gordonstone.
heading: Gordon Park vs Gordonstone — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gordon Park, Queensland and Gordonstone, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gordonstone has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Gordon Park (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gordon Park or Gordonstone safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gordon Park has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Gordonstone scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gordon Park scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Gordonstone scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gordon Park or Gordonstone?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gordonstone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
